    Pool.preparedQuery(String sql)
    Create a prepared query, one of the execute(io.vertx.mutiny.sqlclient.Tuple) or executeBatch(java.util.List<io.vertx.mutiny.sqlclient.Tuple>) methods must be called to execute the query.

    Create a prepared query, one of the execute(io.vertx.mutiny.sqlclient.Tuple) or executeBatch(java.util.List<io.vertx.mutiny.sqlclient.Tuple>) methods must be called to execute the query.
